old_claim.note: Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim_absent: No direct dependency is retained between Quarantine & Public Health Measures and Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation; Quarantine practice is a legal and public-health control on arrivals; it does not require portolan charts as a prerequisite.

source_shape.source_locator: CDC history notes that quarantine practice began during the 14th century to protect coastal cities from plague epidemics, with ships from infected ports held before landing.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: Quarantine practice is a legal and public-health control on arrivals; it does not require portolan charts as a prerequisite.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: The source supports the scoped Quarantine & Public Health Measures claim or adjacent chronology without requiring Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation as a prerequisite.

ontology_before: Quarantine & Public Health Measures treated Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation as a direct prerequisite.
ontology_after: Quarantine & Public Health Measures no longer directly depends on Portolan Charts & Maritime Navigation; the dependency boundary is narrowed to operationally necessary predecessors.
invariant_preserved_or_changed: Invariant changed: quarantine_public_health_measures must not directly depend on portolan_charts_maritime_navigation unless a narrower source-backed node scope is introduced.
would_reject_if: A source shows quarantine_public_health_measures is intentionally scoped only to cases that require portolan_charts_maritime_navigation.
The graph splits quarantine_public_health_measures and reserves this id for a narrower technology that directly depends on portolan_charts_maritime_navigation.
A stronger source demonstrates that portolan_charts_maritime_navigation is chronologically and causally necessary for quarantine_public_health_measures.
short_reason: Quarantine practice is a legal and public-health control on arrivals; it does not require portolan charts as a prerequisite.
